title: Ashen + Copper Rails Compatibility
description: Ashen Resourcepack addon — adds compatibility with the Copper Rails mod.
body:
This addon provides modified item and block textures to ensure compatibility with the Azure Paxels mod while preserving the Ashen resourcepack style.

---

If you encounter any issues, please contact me (sof_izh) on the [Ashen Discord server](https://discord.gg/k5pDjKbhdh). Do not report these issues to Aim_Boot, as this is just a fan-made addon and is not officially affiliated with the main Ashen resourcepack.

---

Credits:
- Aim_Boot – [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen) resourcepack
- Rob0fox – [Copper Rails](https://modrinth.com/mod/copperrails) mod
